header.name: Marcus T. Whitaker
header.summary: Versatile professional with 15+ years of progressive experience spanning construction operations, legal practice, and software product management. JD with hands-on engineering project oversight and a track record of bridging technical, legal, and business domains to deliver complex projects on time and under budget.

coursework: Concentration in Real Estate and Construction Law
Recipient, Stein Scholars Program in Public Interest Law and Ethics
Admitted to New York State Bar, October 2021

entries.org: Lattice Logic, Inc., New York NY
bullets: Lead product strategy for a B2B SaaS platform serving 40+ enterprise legal teams, owning a $4.2M annual revenue line
Shipped an AI-assisted contract review module that reduced average client review time by 38% within two quarters of launch
Manage a cross-functional pod of 9 engineers, designers, and data scientists; established quarterly OKR cadence adopted org-wide
Translate regulatory requirements (GDPR, CCPA, SOX) into product specifications, serving as primary liaison between legal counsel and engineering

entries.role: Associate Attorney, Construction & Real Estate Group
entries.org: Hartwell, Greer & Vance LLP, New York NY
bullets: Advised developers and general contractors on commercial construction disputes totaling over $80M in claim value
Drafted and negotiated AIA contract documents, subcontractor agreements, and lien waivers for projects across the Northeast
Second-chaired a two-week arbitration that resulted in a favorable $6.4M award for a mid-sized GC client
Authored an internal practice guide on prompt-payment statutes that became required reading for incoming associates
Began at age 15 as a summer laborer in family-owned residential and light-commercial general contracting firm; promoted through five roles over eight years
As Project Manager (2015-2018), oversaw 20+ residential renovation and ground-up projects ranging from $150K to $2.1M in contract value
Coordinated subcontractor crews of up to 30 workers, managed permitting with municipal building departments, and maintained 100% on-time inspection pass rate
Implemented a digital job-costing system that reduced project overruns by an average of 11% across the portfolio

entries.name: Open Lien Tracker
bullets: Built open-source web app that tracks mechanic's lien filing deadlines across all 50 states; 1.2K+ GitHub stars
Developed with Next.js, PostgreSQL, and a custom rules engine authored from statutory research conducted during prior legal practice

entries.name: Bar Exam Study Group Platform
bullets: Founded and ran a peer study cohort of 22 J.D. candidates across three law schools using a custom Discord-integrated scheduling bot
All cohort members passed the July 2021 NY Bar on first attempt
